title: rosa obtusifolia subsp. tomentella
intro: Rosa obtusifolia subsp. tomentella is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family, known for its hairy and fragrant leaves and flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa obtusifolia subsp. tomentella include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
